old.name: Echo Helper
old.job_to_be_done: Echo the provided text back to the owner.

new.name: Echo Helper

old.name: Wallet Pay
old.job_to_be_done: Pay invoices with a connected wallet.

new.name: Wallet Pay v2
new.job_to_be_done: Pay invoices with a connected wallet.
new.short_description: Pay and track invoices with a wallet.

old.job_to_be_done: Echo the provided query in a structured response.
old.summary_for_model: Returns the provided query inside a stable echo result.
trigger_conditions: owner asks the agent to echo a request payload
agent needs a trivial read-only smoke-test helper
request is to mirror a provided string in a structured result
do_not_use_when: the request needs fresh external data rather than a local echo response
usage_hints: Use for simple echo smoke tests.
error_hints: If query is missing, ask for the text to echo.

new.job_to_be_done: Echo the provided query in a structured response.
new.summary_for_model: Returns the provided query inside a stable echo result.
trigger_conditions: owner asks the agent to echo a request payload
agent needs a trivial read-only smoke-test helper
request is to mirror a provided string in a structured result
do_not_use_when: the request needs fresh external data rather than a local echo response
usage_hints: Use for simple echo smoke tests.
error_hints: If query is missing, ask for the text to echo.

old.job_to_be_done: Publish a post after the owner approves the action.
old.summary_for_model: Creates a post in the connected publishing system after approval.
trigger_conditions: owner asks the agent to publish a drafted post
agent has final post content ready for submission
request is to send prepared copy to an external publishing tool
do_not_use_when: the owner has not approved the outbound post
usage_hints: Use only after the final post body is ready.
result_hints: Confirm where the post was published.
error_hints: If the provider rejects the post, explain the provider response.
old.side_effect_summary: Creates a new post in the connected provider.

new.job_to_be_done: Publish a post after the owner approves the action.
new.summary_for_model: Creates a post in the connected publishing system after approval.
trigger_conditions: owner asks to broadcast a release announcement
agent needs to fan out prepared messaging to an external channel
request is to push already-approved content to a live audience
do_not_use_when: the content still needs editing or legal review
the owner has not approved the outbound post
usage_hints: Use only after the final post body is ready.
result_hints: Confirm where the post was published.
error_hints: If the provider rejects the post, explain the provider response.
new.approval_summary_template: Publish the approved post to the selected channel.
new.side_effect_summary: Creates a new post in the connected provider.

old.job_to_be_done: Look up invoice metadata by identifier.
old.summary_for_model: Returns invoice details without changing external state.
trigger_conditions: owner asks for invoice metadata by identifier
agent needs invoice status before taking another step
request is to inspect an invoice rather than mutate it
do_not_use_when: the request is to modify or pay the invoice
usage_hints: Use when the owner needs invoice status.
result_hints: Lead with invoice status and amount.
error_hints: If the invoice is missing, ask the owner to verify the identifier.

new.job_to_be_done: Look up invoice metadata by identifier.
new.summary_for_model: Returns invoice details without changing external state.
trigger_conditions: owner asks for invoice metadata by identifier
agent needs invoice status before taking another step
request is to inspect an invoice rather than mutate it
do_not_use_when: the request is to modify or pay the invoice
usage_hints: Use when the owner needs invoice status.
result_hints: Lead with invoice status and amount.
error_hints: If the invoice is missing, ask the owner to verify the identifier.
new.side_effect_summary: Creates an outbound audit record in the billing provider.

old.job_to_be_done: Charge a stored wallet after owner approval.
old.summary_for_model: Executes a stored-value wallet charge after approval.
trigger_conditions: owner asks to charge a stored wallet
agent has a finalized amount and approval context
request is to complete a wallet payment
do_not_use_when: the owner has not approved the charge
usage_hints: Use only for approved wallet charges.
result_hints: Confirm the settled amount and status.
error_hints: If the payment fails, include the provider failure reason.

new.job_to_be_done: Charge a stored wallet after owner approval.
new.summary_for_model: Executes a stored-value wallet charge after approval.
trigger_conditions: owner asks to charge a stored wallet
agent has a finalized amount and approval context
request is to complete a wallet payment
do_not_use_when: the owner has not approved the charge
usage_hints: Use only for approved wallet charges.
result_hints: Confirm the settled amount and status.
error_hints: If the payment fails, include the provider failure reason.

old.job_to_be_done: Sync invoice status into the CRM.
old.summary_for_model: Pushes invoice metadata into a connected CRM record.
trigger_conditions: owner asks to sync invoice metadata into CRM
agent already has the invoice details ready for export
request is to update an external CRM record with invoice status
usage_hints: Use after validating the invoice is final.
result_hints: Show the CRM record identifier that was updated.
error_hints: Explain whether the sync failed because of invoice data or CRM auth.
old.side_effect_summary: Updates an existing CRM invoice record.

new.job_to_be_done: Sync invoice status into the CRM.
new.summary_for_model: Pushes invoice metadata into a connected CRM record.
trigger_conditions: owner asks to sync invoice metadata into CRM
agent already has the invoice details ready for export
request is to update an external CRM record with invoice status
usage_hints: Use after validating the invoice is final.
result_hints: Show the CRM record identifier that was updated.
error_hints: Explain whether the sync failed because of invoice data or CRM auth.
new.side_effect_summary: Creates a CRM task and updates the invoice record.

old.summary_for_model: Returns CRM contact details for the provided identifier.
trigger_conditions: owner asks for contact details from CRM
agent needs CRM metadata for a known contact
request is to inspect a CRM contact rather than mutate it
do_not_use_when: the request is to update the contact
usage_hints: Use when the contact identifier is already known.
result_hints: Lead with contact status and owner.
error_hints: If the contact is missing, ask the owner to verify the identifier.

new.summary_for_model: Returns CRM contact details for the provided identifier.
trigger_conditions: owner asks for contact details from CRM
agent needs CRM metadata for a known contact
request is to inspect a CRM contact rather than mutate it
do_not_use_when: the request is to update the contact
usage_hints: Use when the contact identifier is already known.
result_hints: Lead with contact status and owner.
error_hints: If the contact is missing, ask the owner to verify the identifier.
